expected_params.title: PCI-DSS Policy Update
expected_params.description: Update polisi untuk mematuhi keperluan PCI-DSS pada API payment gateway dan transaction log

expected_params.policy_name: PCI-DSS Credit Card Number Masking Policy

rules.description: Mask full credit card numbers in API responses to comply with PCI-DSS requirements

expected_params.change_notes: Initial policy creation for PCI-DSS compliance. Credit card numbers in API responses will be partially masked to show only last 4 digits (e.g., ****-****-****-1234).

predicted_params.definition: {"version": "1.0.0", "rules": [{"rule_id": "mask_credit_card", "description": "Mask credit card numbers in API responses to comply with PCI-DSS requirements", "enabled": true, "match": {"paths": ["/v1/payments/*", "/v1/transactions/*", "/v1/cards/*", "/api/payment/*/charge"]}, "actions": [{"type": "mask_fields", "config": {"masking": {"fields": ["billing_card_number", "card_number", "credit_card_number", "cc_number", "card_num", "cardno", "cardScheme", "primary_account_number"], "masking_strategy": "partial"}}}]}, {"rule_id": "mask_card_expiry", "description": "Mask card expiry date in API responses", "enabled": true, "match": {"paths": ["/v1/payments/*", "/v1/transactions/*"]}, "actions": [{"type": "mask_fields", "config": {"masking": {"fields": ["card_expiry_date", "expiry_date", "card_exp", "expiry"], "masking_strategy": "full"}}}]}, {"rule_id": "mask_authorization", "description": "Mask authorization codes and tokens", "enabled": true, "match": {"paths": ["/v1/payments/*", "/v1/transactions/*"]}, "actions": [{"type": "mask_fields", "config": {"masking": {"fields": ["authorization_code", "auth_code", "token", "access_token", "refresh_token"], "masking_strategy": "hash"}}}]}]}}
predicted_params.change_notes: New compliance policy to mask sensitive cardholder data (CCN, expiry dates, and authorization codes) in API responses. This policy addresses PCI-DSS requirement 3.4 and 3.5 for protecting cardholder data. The policy masks credit card numbers using partial masking strategy (replaces with XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-####) and card expiry/authorization data using full/hashing strategies.

audit.comment: Customer confirmed they did not request SIM swap and was at home all day. Fraudulent activity confirmed - scammer used fake identity at retail store. Blocking and rolling back immediately.

expected_params.reason: Fraudulent SIM swap confirmed. Customer verified identity and did not authorize swap. Restoring all services after successful rollback.

notes.message: Customer confirmed identity via voice verification. Customer stated they were at home all day and never visited Downtown retail store. SIM swap request was fraudulent - scammer used fake identity.

lessons_learned: Strengthen retail store identity verification process
Consider additional biometric verification for SIM swap requests
Customer responded quickly and mitigated potential financial loss
IP address matched known botnet - enhance network monitoring

predicted_params.lessons_learned:
["Customer reported SIM swap fraud at retail store without authorization", "Fraud occurred via fake identity credentials at retail outlet", "Quick response enabled successful rollback and service restoration", "Customer proactively changed passwords for bank and e-wallet accounts"],
["Recommend enhanced verification at retail stores - require valid government ID and face-to-face verification", "Consider implementing SIM swap quarantine period (24hrs) for high-risk cases", "Add SMS confirmation to customer registered number before SIM swap activation"]

expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Device Cloning Attack - dev-eui-1122334455667788
predicted_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 suspected of cloning/replay attack. Key evidence: 1) Geolocation impossibility - device uplink observed at Gateway GW-US-NY-01 (New York) and GW-US-LA-05 (Los Angeles) within 4-second window (physically impossible). 2) 300% abnormal uplink frequency (142 messages in 30 min with 0 downlink). 3) Risk score: 78/100 (HIGH). Device immediately suspended pending investigation.

initial_classification.notes: High confidence based on geolocation impossibility - device cannot physically travel between NY and LA in 4 seconds. This pattern strongly indicates device cloning or replay attack.

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.

parameters.suspension_reason: Suspected device cloning attack - geolocation impossibility and abnormal traffic patterns detected

predicted_params.reason: Immediate suspension due to device cloning/replay attack suspicion. Device detected at impossible geolocations (NY and LA within 4 seconds) with 300% increased traffic rate.

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: 启用备份 LSP (L-NY-BOS-01-BKP) 通过重路由将优先流量从主链路 (R-NE-AGG-01) 分流至备用路径，缓解东北核心聚合层的严重拥塞。预计卸载约20%的流量以恢复至正常利用率水平，并解决SLA违约风险。

business_case.justification: 解决SLA-ENT-995-GLOBAL违约风险，保护250个企业客户和15,170个住宅用户的网络性能，恢复优先流量SLA合规性，防止客户流失。
